name: documents_send_from_template
description: Send a document for e-signature using a pre-configured template. Assign signers to template roles and optionally customize fields.

parameters.name: templateId
parameters.description: The template ID to use (query parameter).

parameters.name: Roles
parameters.description: Array of role assignments with 'RoleIndex', 'SignerName', 'SignerEmail', and 'SignerType'.

parameters.name: Message
parameters.description: Custom message for the signing notification.

parameters.name: Labels
parameters.description: Tags or labels to categorize the document.

parameters.name: ExpiryDays
parameters.description: Number of days before the document expires.

body.Title: NDA Agreement - Jane Smith
body.Message: Please review and sign the NDA.
